common.description: Auto-triggers every time the card is played

epic.description: Player chooses when to activate (3 uses per battle)

legendary.description: Player chooses when to activate (2 uses per battle)

powerSystem.notes: All powers only affect the current battle. No effects carry over to future battles. Power trigger type is determined by the card's rarity, not the hero number.

heroPowers.name: Genesis
heroPowers.description: Reveals opponent's next card before it's played.
heroPowers.flavor: His mystery grants foresight — you see what's coming next.

heroPowers.name: Metalik
heroPowers.description: +3 strength. Metalik's smart-contract-reinforced body is nearly indestructible.
heroPowers.flavor: Steel skin gleams as smart contracts reinforce his frame.

heroPowers.name: Litespeed
heroPowers.description: If losing this round, play a second card and add its strength.
heroPowers.flavor: A blur of speed — Litespeed plays two cards before anyone can blink.

heroPowers.name: CoinCommando
heroPowers.description: Opponent's card loses 2 strength. Explosions weaken the enemy.
heroPowers.flavor: BOOM! CoinCommando's explosive charge rattles the opponent.

heroPowers.name: Trilogy
heroPowers.description: +1 strength for every 3 cards in your win pile (max +5).
heroPowers.flavor: Trilogy builds momentum — the more you've won, the stronger the construct.

heroPowers.name: Magic Man
heroPowers.description: Swap this card's strength with the opponent's card strength.
heroPowers.flavor: Now you see it... now you don't! Strengths are magically switched.

heroPowers.name: Master Control
heroPowers.description: +2 strength. If you win this round, gain +1 bonus on your next round.
heroPowers.flavor: The disc arcs perfectly, returning with extra momentum.

heroPowers.name: Stampede
heroPowers.description: Both cards get a random strength modifier between -2 and +3.
heroPowers.flavor: Stampede's chaotic energy shakes up both sides — anything can happen!

heroPowers.name: Brightstroke
heroPowers.description: Negates opponent's power this round. Brightstroke paints a protective shield.
heroPowers.flavor: A vivid shield of living paint absorbs the enemy's ability.

heroPowers.name: Mr Wick
heroPowers.description: If you lose this round, destroy 1 random card from opponent's win pile.
heroPowers.flavor: Even in defeat, Mr. Wick's flames consume an enemy card.

heroPowers.name: CypherFunk
heroPowers.description: Peek at opponent's next 2 cards and choose which they must play next.
heroPowers.flavor: CypherFunk hacks into the enemy's hand and forces their play.

heroPowers.name: Felonious
heroPowers.description: +2 strength. If in a WAR (tie), +5 instead. Felonious thrives under pressure.
heroPowers.flavor: Chains break as Felonious powers up — especially when cornered!

heroPowers.name: The Oracle
heroPowers.description: Reveals both players' next cards. You may choose to force a WAR instead.
heroPowers.flavor: The Oracle's third eye opens, seeing what lies ahead for both sides.

heroPowers.name: Super Stomp
heroPowers.description: +4 strength, but only if your card's base strength is lower than opponent's.
heroPowers.flavor: The disciplined warrior channels strength when outmatched.

heroPowers.name: X-Change
heroPowers.description: Copy the opponent's power this round and use it as your own.
heroPowers.flavor: X-Change's mask shimmers as he takes on the enemy's own ability!

heroPowers.name: Great Gecko
heroPowers.description: +1 strength. If you lose, this card returns to your deck instead of opponent's win pile.
heroPowers.flavor: Great Gecko clings to the wall and escapes capture.

heroPowers.name: Courage
heroPowers.description: +3 strength. Courage cannot be affected by opponent powers this round.
heroPowers.flavor: Soaring above it all, no Centralizer trick can touch Courage.

heroPowers.name: Renegade
heroPowers.description: If you lose this round, negate the loss — it becomes a tie instead.
heroPowers.flavor: Renegade should be down, but somehow... he's still standing.

heroPowers.name: Lady Lightning
heroPowers.description: Opponent's card loses 3 strength. If it drops below yours, steal 1 card from tie pile.
heroPowers.flavor: ZAP! Lightning arcs through the opponent's card, shorting it out.

heroPowers.name: Silver Scientist
heroPowers.description: Convert the tie pile into bonus strength: +1 per card in the tie pile.
heroPowers.flavor: The alchemist transmutes accumulated data into raw power.

heroPowers.name: Wyld Wrangler
heroPowers.description: Opponent's power is disabled and their strength is reduced by 1.
heroPowers.flavor: YEEHAW! The lasso wraps tight, shutting down the enemy.

heroPowers.name: The Emissary
heroPowers.description: +1 strength for each of the last 3 rounds you won (max +3).
heroPowers.flavor: The crowd roars as Emissary rides a winning streak!

heroPowers.name: Data Avenger
heroPowers.description: Opponent loses 2 strength. If opponent's power was active, they lose 4 instead.
heroPowers.flavor: P.O.G. locks on and fires — extra damage if the target's systems are active!

heroPowers.name: The Wizard
heroPowers.description: Choose one: +3 strength OR opponent -3 strength.
heroPowers.flavor: The Wizard's spell can shield or strike — the choice is yours.

heroPowers.name: Overseer
heroPowers.description: +2 strength to this card. Your next card also gets +1 strength.
heroPowers.flavor: Overseer's briefing boosts morale for this round and the next.

heroPowers.name: Forecaster
heroPowers.description: Randomly set opponent's strength to any value between 1 and their current strength.
heroPowers.flavor: An unpredictable storm rolls in, disrupting the enemy's power.

heroPowers.name: Professor Axiom
heroPowers.description: Double the difference if you win this round (win by 2 → gain 4 cards equivalent).
heroPowers.flavor: Axiom's calculations amplify the victory to mathematical perfection.

heroPowers.name: Maximum
heroPowers.description: +5 strength, but if you lose anyway, opponent gains +2 on their next round.
heroPowers.flavor: Maximum charges with devastating power — but the rebound can hurt.

heroPowers.name: The Chairman
heroPowers.description: Reduce all damage to this card by 3 (opponent power effects reduced by 3).
heroPowers.flavor: A glowing energy shield deflects incoming attacks.

heroPowers.name: The Senator
heroPowers.description: Force this round to be a tie regardless of strength values.
heroPowers.flavor: The Senator talks and talks until time runs out — nobody wins this round.

heroPowers.name: Mz Stability
heroPowers.description: Set your card's strength to match your opponent's exactly, then add +1.
heroPowers.flavor: Mz Stability plants her feet and becomes an immovable wall — plus a little extra.

heroPowers.name: Dynamic Defiant
heroPowers.description: +4 strength. Negates opponent's power. The ultimate offense and defense.
heroPowers.flavor: Reality bends as Defiant lifts everything in his path with his mind.

heroPowers.name: Bitcoin Bro
heroPowers.description: Hide your card's strength from the opponent. They must play blind.
heroPowers.flavor: Thick smoke rolls in — the opponent can't see what they're up against.

heroPowers.name: Sooth 'N Sayer
heroPowers.description: Peek at the next 3 cards in your deck. You may rearrange them in any order.
heroPowers.flavor: Two minds are better than one — Sooth n' Sayer sees the future and rearranges it!

heroPowers.name: Gingergirl
heroPowers.description: +3 strength. If this is a WAR round, +6 instead.
heroPowers.flavor: The powergloves crackle with energy — double power during WAR!

heroPowers.name: Jester
heroPowers.description: Randomly trigger any other hero's power from your deck.
heroPowers.flavor: What will Jester do? Nobody knows — not even Jester!

heroPowers.name: The Creatrix
heroPowers.description: Create a phantom card with strength 3 and add it to the round (your total = card + 3).
heroPowers.flavor: From nothing, Creatrix conjures a soldier of light to fight alongside her.

heroPowers.name: Scrivener
heroPowers.description: Change the opponent's card to any card already in their discard/win pile.
heroPowers.flavor: Scrivener's pen strikes, rewriting what card the opponent plays.

heroPowers.name: Rowdy Rook
heroPowers.description: +2 strength. If you win, peek at opponent's next card.
heroPowers.flavor: Rook dives from above, and his keen eyes spot what's coming next.

heroPowers.name: Rocketman
heroPowers.description: +2 strength for each consecutive win (resets on loss). Max +6.
heroPowers.flavor: Rocketman's turbine accelerates with every victory — he's really taking off!

heroPowers.name: The Prophet
heroPowers.description: Steal opponent's power and use it for yourself this round. If they had none, +3 strength.
heroPowers.flavor: The Prophet converts the enemy's own strength to his cause.

heroPowers.name: Rock Fierce
heroPowers.description: +4 strength. Opponent's power is crushed (negated). Rocks beat everything.
heroPowers.flavor: A massive boulder flies through the air — nothing stops it!

heroPowers.name: The Crusader
heroPowers.description: +3 strength. If opponent tries to reduce your strength, reduce theirs by the same amount instead.
heroPowers.flavor: The Crusader's immutable armor reflects all attacks back at the attacker.

heroPowers.name: Supernova
heroPowers.description: +6 strength. The single biggest raw power boost in the game.
heroPowers.flavor: KABOOM! Supernova unleashes the fury of a collapsing star.

heroPowers.name: Ethermage
heroPowers.description: +4 strength. This power cannot be negated, copied, or stolen.
heroPowers.flavor: Smart contract magic — once cast, it cannot be undone.

heroPowers.name: Repeat
heroPowers.description: Play this card's power twice. Whatever effect it has, it happens two times.
heroPowers.flavor: Everything happens twice with Repeat — the Centralizers are seeing double!

heroPowers.name: Executive Powers
heroPowers.description: Steal all cards from the current tie pile (if any). If no tie pile, +4 strength.
heroPowers.flavor: Powers swoops in and acquires all contested assets.

heroPowers.name: Everlasting
heroPowers.description: Replay the previous round with this card replacing your last card. Can change the outcome.
heroPowers.flavor: Time folds as Everlasting steps back and rewrites history.

heroPowers.name: Captain Crypto
heroPowers.description: Opponent's next 2 cards are revealed AND their strength is reduced by 1 each.
heroPowers.flavor: COVER YOUR EARS! The shockwave rattles cards out of the enemy's deck.

heroPowers.name: Megamine
heroPowers.description: Dig 5 cards deep into your deck. Play the strongest one instead of this card.
heroPowers.flavor: Megamine drills deep and surfaces with the best card buried below.
